Container.Name: Musically
Container.Overview:
Self-hosted music discovery and download automation. Polls LastFM + Spotify, runs a rule engine, downloads FLAC from Qobuz, tags with beets, and organizes your music library.
Features: - Smart discovery from LastFM, Spotify, and MusicBrainz - Auto-download albums from Qobuz based on configurable rules - Auto-tagging with beets (MusicBrainz) for perfect FLAC metadata - Swipeable mobile web UI built with React + Cohere design system - Discord notifications when downloads complete - Watch folder for automatic tagging of new files
🗄️ Uses SQLite by default — no separate database needed. For production with background workers (Celery), set DATABASE_URL and REDIS_URL to point at PostgreSQL and Redis containers.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port to access the Musically web interface. Container runs nginx on port 80 internally.

Config.Name: Web UI HTTPS Port
Config.Description: HTTPS port for Spotify OAuth. Uses a self-signed certificate — accept the browser warning. Spotify requires https:// redirect URIs.

Config.Name: Music Library
Config.Description: Your FLAC music library (NAS share). Contains your organized music files.

Config.Name: Downloads Staging
Config.Description: Temporary staging for Qobuz downloads before beets processes them.

Config.Name: AppData Config
Config.Description: Application config, beets configuration, and persistent data.

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: Database connection string. Default uses built-in PostgreSQL. Data persists in /config/postgres.

Config.Name: Redis URL
Config.Description: Redis connection string. Default uses built-in Redis. Data persists in /config/redis.

Config.Name: Database Password
Config.Description: PostgreSQL password (only needed if using external PostgreSQL).

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Random secret for encrypting tokens. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Qobuz Email
Config.Description: Your Qobuz account email address (required for downloads).

Config.Name: Qobuz Password
Config.Description: Your Qobuz account password.

Config.Name: LastFM API Key
Config.Description: LastFM API key. Get one at https://www.last.fm/api/account/create

Config.Name: LastFM API Secret
Config.Description: LastFM API shared secret.

Config.Name: LastFM Username
Config.Description: Your LastFM username to poll for recent tracks.

Config.Name: Spotify Client ID
Config.Description: Spotify API client ID. Get one at https://developer.spotify.com/dashboard

Config.Name: Spotify Client Secret
Config.Description: Spotify API client secret.

Config.Name: Spotify Redirect URI
Config.Description: OAuth redirect URI (must match your Spotify app settings).

Config.Name: Discord Webhook URL
Config.Description: Discord webhook URL for download notifications. Create at Server Settings → Integrations → Webhooks.

Config.Name: Environment
Config.Description: Application environment: development or production.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Log level: debug, info, warning, error.
